name: eb5-due-diligence
description: Exhaustive, independent due diligence on EB-5 immigrant-investor projects (reserved category / $800K). Extracts every claim from issuer/attorney docs, re-verifies each against primary sources (USCIS, SEC EDGAR, PACER, Census/BLS), and produces a self-contained HTML report with separate Immigration and Financial Risk Scores, a Go/No-Go verdict, inline citations, a red-flag/data-gap log, and side-by-side comparison.
